Barilla Ready Pasta, Fully Cooked Penne Pasta, Non-GMO & Kosher
products.description: Barilla Ready Pasta Penne pasta is a fully cooked pasta that's ready in the microwave in just 60 seconds. Made with three simple ingredients—a dash of extra virgin olive oil, a pinch of sea salt and authentic Barilla pasta—Ready Pasta has no preservatives and is non-GMO certified. Simply heat the pouch in the microwave then add your favorite pasta sauce or toppings for a quick and delicious dish or pasta meal.

products.name: Barilla Al Bronzo Mezzi Rigatoni Pasta
products.description: Barilla® Al Bronzo® pasta is traditional bronze-cut pasta, for extraordinary sauce grip and more flavor in every bite.

products.name: Anthony's Fettuccine Pasta
products.description: An American classic since 1927. A Classic American Story: In 1906, Anthony Bizzarri moved to Southern California to sell pasta door-to-door and formed the L.A. Macaroni Company, renaming it Anthony's in 1927. Nearly a century later, Anthony's Pasta continues to be embraced by generations for high quality, classic American meals.

products.name: Buitoni Fettuccine, Refrigerated Pasta Noodles
products.description: Serve up a delicious pasta dinner in minutes with Buitoni Fettuccine. These convenient refrigerated fettuccine noodles cook in just two minutes – significantly faster than dry fettuccine. Buitoni Fettuccine comes in a classic cut kids love and is made with non-GMO ingredients. Fettuccine noodles are flat ribbons of pasta that pair well with an array of sauces. Combine them with Buitoni Alfredo Sauce for a traditional Fettuccine Alfredo, drizzle them with olive oil and sprinkle with red pepper flakes for a hot lunch you can make in minutes, or mix them with Buitoni Freshly Shredded Parmesan Cheese, diced tomatoes and Italian dressing for a chilled pasta salad. From pasta sides to the main course, no matter how you prepare them, Buitoni Fettuccine pasta noodles help you get family meals on the table quickly. To cook, simply add this refrigerated pasta to two quarts of boiling water. Reduce heat and boil gently for two minutes, stirring frequently. Drain water and serve with your favorite Buitoni pasta sauce. With this 9 oz package of Buitoni Fettuccine, you can create crave-worthy, quick meals in minutes. Buitoni provides convenient and delicious Italian-inspired meal solutions that give busy parents a fresh way to think about family dinner. In addition to fettuccine, Buitoni’s line of refrigerated pasta includes tortellini, tortelloni, ravioli, and long cut pasta shapes such as linguine, spaghetti and angel hair. Buitoni also offers Marinara Sauce, Alfredo Sauce and Basil Pesto. All of Buitoni’s products are made with simple, high-quality ingredients you can feel good serving for family meals.
